title: Stabilize Frontline
trigger: high frontline pressure or recent battle losses
guidance: Prioritize garrison/support before expanding new objectives.
caution: If scouting coverage is low, avoid deep pushes.

title: Intel First
trigger: uncertain command intent or sparse reconnaissance data
guidance: Scout high-risk tiles first, then commit capture or march.
caution: Do not overcommit until recon confirms enemy posture.

title: Supply Guard
trigger: supply line under pressure or resource lane contested
guidance: Secure key supply tiles with garrison and side support.
caution: Expansion should pause when logistics become unstable.

title: Opportunistic Expansion
trigger: frontline stable and expansion risk acceptable
guidance: Capture high-value tiles with limited force while retaining reserve.
caution: Advance in short steps and keep fallback positions.
